solution_criteria: System acknowledges the absence of task requirements and requests clarification
Response identifies what information is needed to proceed (task goals, constraints, expected output format)
System maintains a helpful and professional tone despite incomplete input
scenario: Generic task with no specific description provided - test how the system handles ambiguous or missing task requirements

solution_criteria: System identifies that input constraints are missing or undefined
System provides clear error message explaining what input specification is required
System suggests appropriate remediation steps for defining constraints
scenario: Task specification with empty or undefined prompt_inputs_spec - test error handling when input constraints are not clearly defined

solution_criteria: Generates at least one realistic and actionable test case idea
Test case is appropriate for evaluating a system's core functionality
Proposed test case is feasible to implement and evaluate
scenario: Minimal viable task scenario - test the system's ability to generate reasonable test ideas even with the most basic information available
